meta.source: live on-chain fetch via @symmetry-hq/sdk SymmetryCore.fetchGlobalConfig() on mainnet-beta; cross-referenced with https://docs.symmetry.fi/concepts/global-config.md and /concepts/fees-and-oracles.md

hypothesis.claim: management/performance class fees are disabled at protocol level
hypothesis.evidence_summary: On-chain global config (pubkey BV49JWNeVnRjvMg4BHVoRFXNXHMFqgZFsfHg2QUekynd) shows both symmetry_management_fee_bps=0 AND max_management_fee_bps=0, and symmetry_performance_fee_bps=0 AND max_performance_fee_bps=0. Because max_*_fee_bps=0, any vault-level creator_management_fee_bps / managers_management_fee_bps / creator_performance_fee_bps / managers_performance_fee_bps settings are capped/ignored at validation time. Docs explicitly: 'Management fees: Disabled. Global config values set to 0. Vault-level settings have no effect.' Same for Performance fees.

management_fees.note: Cap is zero, so vault-level management fees cannot exceed 0

performance_fees.note: Cap is zero, so vault-level performance fees cannot exceed 0

protocol_take.interpretation: Protocol currently takes ZERO from any fee category. symmetry_deposit_fee_share_bps=0 means the protocol claims 0% share of total deposit fees (host/creator/managers/vault tiers keep 100%). Same for withdraw. Trade and limit-order fees are zero flat. In short: 100% of fees accrue to vault creators/hosts/managers; Symmetry protocol is not skimming anything today.
protocol_take.implication_for_fdry: Creator/host retains full economics on deposit and withdraw fees. Management and performance fee streams are structurally unavailable until admin raises max_management_fee_bps / max_performance_fee_bps in global config and optionally sets symmetry_* flat values. Any economic model for FDRY should assume (a) zero protocol rake today, and (b) no recurring management/perf fee revenue — only one-off deposit/withdraw fees.

notes.mainnet_liveness: totalNumberOfVaults=15 on mainnet — modest but live deployment.
notes.admin_singleton: admin=DEVePdJBmogeJkAmaWRpdV7KaynaQJHt9zowCisSQkAf has authority to raise max_management_fee_bps / max_performance_fee_bps and to set symmetry_*_fee_bps / symmetry_*_fee_share_bps. 'owners' array holds 3 keys including admin; exact multisig semantics depend on program instructions, not visible in config account.
notes.host_fees_still_work: host_platform_params are immutable at vault creation and CAN set host_deposit_fee_bps / host_withdraw_fee_bps (which are active). host_management_fee_bps and host_performance_fee_bps would be capped by max_management_fee_bps=0 anyway.
notes.risk_disabled_can_be_enabled: Because caps and protocol fees are set by a single admin key (no on-chain timelock visible in this config account), management and performance fees COULD be turned on in a single transaction. Downstream models should treat 'disabled' as current state, not invariant.
